parameters.query: SELECT * FROM pricing_rules WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY priority DESC;
SELECT kiotviet_product_id, product_code, product_name, category_name, base_price, cost FROM kiotviet_product_cache;

INSERT INTO user_sessions (zalo_user_id, session_state, context_data, expires_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{$json.zalo_user_id}}',
  'waiting_for_price_confirm',
  jsonb_build_object('alerts', {{$json.alerts ? JSON.stringify($json.alerts).replace(/'/g, "''") : '[]'}}::jsonb, 'invoice_meta', {{$json.invoice_meta ? JSON.stringify($json.invoice_meta).replace(/'/g, "''") : '{}'}}::jsonb),
  NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (zalo_user_id)
DO UPDATE SET session_state='waiting_for_price_confirm', context_data=EXCLUDED.context_data, expires_at=EXCLUDED.expires_at, updated_at=NOW();
